SEARCH
Package Cataphract.API.Dragon

Class AccountModify

java.lang.Object
Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
public class AccountModify extends Object
A class to modify user accounts on the system. Can be restricted by policy "account_modify"
Since:
0.0.1 (Zen Quantum 0.0.1)
Version:
3.9.7 (20-February-2024, Cataphract)
Author:
DAK404 (https://github.com/DAK404)
